questions.question: Describe at least two cloud security defense strategies that can be employed to mitigate the risk of cyber-attacks in a cloud environment. Explain the benefits of each strategy. (15 marks)
An organization is using a cloud-based system that is exposed to the internet. What type of security risk is this, and how can it be mitigated? (10 marks)

A cloud service provider has implemented a distributed intrusion detection system. What are the two key components of this system, and how do they work together to detect and prevent cyber-attacks? (10 marks)
